title: Sirajganj Heavy Rain
lead: Sirajganj is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of +3.00. The Score of 10.0/10 indicates an extreme anomaly.
body:
The current weather conditions in Sirajganj are characterized by heavy rain, with an Umidita of 86% and Vento of 3.6 km/h. 
 The CDD of 9.5 GG and HDD of 0.0 GG suggest a significant impact on cooling and heating demands. 
 The critical level of this event necessitates immediate attention to mitigate potential damage and disruptions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to address the critical heavy rain event in Sirajganj.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to flooding
